ideation: This animation sequence depicts two figures embracing, symbolizing the love and connection represented by the emoji.  The animation will focus on a gentle, flowing embrace rather than a stiff, robotic posture.  The movement will emphasize the closeness and affection between the two figures. Frame 1 will show both arms extended slightly outward, palms facing each other, to emphasize the welcoming and open gesture of the embrace. As the sequence progresses, the arms will move inward and upward to gently pull each other close. The final frame will show both arms embracing, with a slight curve to accentuate the loving gesture.  The wrists will remain relatively neutral throughout, focusing on the overall embrace.

frames.beat: arms open slightly, welcoming embrace begins
arms draw closer, a gentle pull inward
figures embrace, held close in love
